name: El Diablo

spec.method_detail: Build in ice-filled highball. Add tequila, cassis, lime. Top with ginger beer. Stir gently.

history: Trader Vic published the El Diablo in 'Trader Vic's Bartender's Guide' (1947). It's one of the first prominent tequila cocktails to reach American audiences — tequila was exotic in the 1940s. Cassis and ginger beer make it vibrant and spicy-fruity.
